study.name: Soil metagenome
study.title: Native Miscanthus rhizosphere and endophytic microbiome
study.description: Survey of the native Miscanthus rhizosphere and endophytic microbiome in Taiwan, with particular attention placed on the diazotrophic community. This survey aimed to determine the ecological drivers of microbial community composition across strong biogeographical and ecological gradients in two species of wild Miscanthus on the island of Taiwan in 2008.
